developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback, we're glad that you enjoy the game :)

reviews.review_description: I've played new version and it's much better. Tracks looks great, sometimes it's difficult to focus on the road because I enjoy the view :) I use tuneling all the time, and that's what I suggest when you're getting sick. There is improvement in AI, at the moment it feels ok, although it sometimes does weird stuff. I already won one championships and got a cup on shelve.

reviews.review_title: Finally a game that doesn't give me a he
reviews.review_description: Car racing in VR is fantastic, you have real feelings and yet you are safe. Unfortunately I have tried a few games and after such races I always had a headache and felt like vomiting. This game is different, I can easily do a few levels and nothing happens to me. It is a real comfort and I can finally have fun the way I like, without a migraine.

I almost fell off the couch, what excitement!
This game is simply great, from the car selection itself, to the races. Attention, the car selection matters!
What excitement, with each turn I was doing better and better, although not without driving into the barriers. Really great fun, for all those who love racing in a safe form.

reviews.review_title: The player literally feels like they are
reviews.review_description: The player literally feels like they are behind the wheel – just look through the window to admire the panorama of the rushing tracks or the passing landscapes. Simulator sickness is one of the biggest problems in VR games, especially in the racing genre, where dynamic movements and changes in perspective can cause discomfort. In this game, however, the creators have implemented a number of solutions to improve the comfort of the game – from image stabilization to customizable field of view options. Thanks to this, even beginner VR players can enjoy the fun without worrying about their well-being.

This is a solid VR racing experience with a great level of realism. Being able to adjust the seat position makes a big difference in comfort and immersion, and with plenty of cars and tracks to choose from, there’s a lot of variety to keep things interesting.

VR racing games are still pretty rare on Meta Quest, so this one is definitely worth trying. The developers are also very responsive and listen to player feedback, which is always a huge plus. If you're into racing and looking for a fun and customizable VR experience, this is a great choice! 🚗💨🔥

I like the championships with official racing pointing system and I can get a lot of trophies (that's at least what the big empty shelves suggest). Number of tracks is impressive (counted 15), there is also nice selection of cars (there is pickup with tree on it, so funny to see it like someone just harvesting woods and got to the racing). Good thing is that I can play standing or sitting (but it seems that I have to decide about it before race, otherwise the height is not good). I hope dev will add new cars and tracks from time to time.

Finally a game that makes me feel good. Great tracks and driving experience. Very cool cars that you can choose. Quite a thrill when you want to outdo your rivals, but on the other hand you have to be careful not to fall out of the corner. I recommend it.

Super fun, this is a must-have for fans of virtual reality racing who value comfort and realism of gameplay. With well-thought-out mechanics and a variety of game modes, it provides hours of exciting fun.

All other racing games I played were very similar in terms of driving. This on is actually something new. You have of course driving wheel. But you also have this throttle, like in a boat, which for VR can be ideal.
I like that cars are different, not only in terms of visuals, but also driving. Mirrors, lights and engine start buttons are nice additions, there is plenty of tracks and championship mode is very nice.

I can finally play racing on VR without getting sick. In this regard, game does what it promise. Even my wife can do couple of rounds, which never happened before. AI on Easy is pretty easy, but it gets more complicated on Normal and Hard. And if it's too easy, then just take car that doesn't accelerate that fast.
I would like a refund please

developer_response.body:
Oh, we are very sad that you don't like the game. We understand, that this game sometimes require more training and settings adjustments before it will be really enjoyable. At any point you can join us on Discord, suggest improvements, ask for help or see how others are playing and enjoying.

About refund you need to contact Meta directly, we don't do direct sales.
